value: docs/status.md is NOT the source of truth for portfolio state. It is a decision log that goes stale. The ONLY source of truth for current positions is Interactive Brokers via ib_sync.py. data/portfolio.json is also a cache. ALWAYS verify against IB before claiming a position exists or doesn't exist. On Mar 11, EWY was incorrectly reported as an active position because status.md still listed it under Rule Violations — both legs had been closed the day before.
